channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TFF3 Protein Plays Key Role in Childhood Tumor Survival and Treatment Resistance
item.description: A recent study published in Liver International reveals that the protein TFF3 plays a critical role in the survival and progression of hepatoblastoma, a common malignant liver tumor in children. Resea...

item.title: Defense Secretary dismisses Chinese scholars' claim over Batanes sovereignty
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. dismissed as baseless the claim by Chinese scholars that the Philippines’ northernmost province of Batanes belongs to China through Taiwan, calling it a 'joke' a...

item.title: Senate showdown between Dan Kline and Graham Platner on key legislation
item.description: The article details a pivotal political confrontation between Senators Dan Kline and Graham Platner over critical legislative proposals. Kline, representing a conservative district, advocates for dere...

item.title: Caitlin Clark's Struggles Highlight Indiana Fever's Challenges in Loss to Shorthanded Sparks
item.description: Caitlin Clark's return to the Indiana Fever after a back injury was marked by a lackluster performance, as the team fell to the shorthanded Los Angeles Sparks 106-92. Despite her anticipated comeback,...

item.title: PM Modi and Albanese Discuss Diplomatic Ties and Strategic Agreements During India-Australia Summit
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese used cricket metaphors to describe their diplomatic relationship during a joint press statement in Melbourne. Modi compared ...

item.title: MTN and Telecel prepare to bid for Ghana's 5G licenses after government changes
item.description: MTN Group and Telecel Group are preparing to bid for 5G licenses in Ghana following the government's decision to revoke Next Gen Infraco's exclusive rights. The auction, expected within weeks, comes a...

item.title: Ottawa Charge Announces Plans at Canadian Tire Centre
item.description: The Ottawa Charge, a professional sports team based in Ottawa, is set to make a significant announcement at the Canadian Tire Centre today. This event, which has generated considerable media attention...

item.title: DA Appoints Young Leader Mathew Cuthbert as CEO
item.description: Mathew Cuthbert, a 33-year-old Democratic Alliance (DA) member, has been appointed as the party's CEO, a role that has been vacant since 2021. Cuthbert, who began his political career as a low-ranking...

item.title: India and Australia Secure Uranium Agreement to Boost Clean Energy Initiatives
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi has secured a long-awaited uranium supply agreement with Australia, marking a significant step toward India's nuclear energy expansion. The pact, announced during M...

item.title: Nathan Cleary's leadership secures NSW's State of Origin series lead
item.description: Nathan Cleary's commanding performance in the State of Origin decider has silenced critics who doubted his ability to 'own' the series. Despite facing pre-match skepticism, the NSW Blues halfback orch...

item.title: Trump authorises Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missiles amid Russian condemnation
item.description: The article details the geopolitical tensions between Ukraine, Russia, and NATO following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement that Kyiv will be permitted to produce Patriot missiles. This decis...

item.title: Gadkari Announces Comprehensive Development Plans for Delhi-Mumbai Corridor
item.description: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari announced that the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway will be fully completed within two years, with 75-80% of the ₹1.10 lakh crore project already finished. During a visit to Kota, ...

item.title: Volkswagen Faces Unions' Protest Over Major Job Cuts and Restructuring Plans
item.description: Volkswagen, Europe's largest carmaker, is facing intense pressure from US tariffs, shrinking profits from electric vehicles, and fierce competition in China. The company’s management is set to announc...

item.title: Artistic Transformation of a Dutch Power Substation into a Turquoise Wall
item.description: In Beverwijk, Netherlands, Studio RAP has transformed a high-voltage power substation into an eye-catching ceramic wall titled 'Powerwall.' The project, part of their exploration of material and techn...

item.title: Harvard Researchers Develop Silicon Chip for DNA Synthesis
item.description: Harvard researchers have developed a silicon chip capable of synthesizing multiple DNA sequences simultaneously using water-based enzymatic reactions. This breakthrough, published in Nature Electronic...

item.title: Sudbury-area suspect faces arrest over assault incident
item.description: A warrant has been issued for the arrest of a suspect involved in an assault incident in the Sudbury area of Northern Ontario. The suspect, whose identity has not been disclosed, is alleged to have co...

item.title: Meta Launches Muse Image AI Tool with Controversial Data Usage Policies
item.description: Meta Platforms has launched Muse Image, an AI image generation tool that allows users to create images using text prompts or public Instagram photos. The feature is integrated into Meta AI and availab...

item.title: Government Interventions Aim to Reduce SA's Informal Settlements
item.description: Human settlements minister Thembi Simelane has acknowledged the significant challenges in eradicating South Africa's 4,200 informal settlements, emphasizing that the task is 'stacked against us'. She ...

item.title: Tanzania Private Sector Foundation Launches Strategic Partnership with International Chamber of Commerce
item.description: The Tanzania Private Sector Foundation (TPSF) has officially joined the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC) through a strategic partnership signed during the Tanzania-France Business Roundtable in...

item.title: Umzulu Phaqa on Building a Sustainable Music Career Through Consistency
item.description: Umzulu Phaqa, real name Sphiwe Moya, discusses her approach to building a sustainable music career, emphasizing consistency over chasing viral fame. After her song 'Mam’gobhozi' gained online traction...
